title: jatropha angustifolia var. spathulata
intro: Jatropha angustifolia var. spathulata, also known as the narrow-leaf jatropha, is a plant species that belongs to the family Euphorbiaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Jatropha angustifolia var. spathulata are traditionally used in infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
